notes: SYS.PRIVATE_LEAK is the deterministic privacy/leak backstop emitted by engine/gate/privacy-leak.js when source-derived copy (especially work-recap memory content) carries residual sensitive material into the human-visible draft/package — a secret/credential shape (reuses redact.js), a sensitive structural shape (financial amount, internal-id), or a configured work_recap.private_term. It HARD-blocks and routes back to the writer BEFORE the approval card (defense in depth; the human is the final backstop, §2.4). Although deterministic, the gate-regression runner has no driver for the 'sys' gate (its deterministic drivers are lint/package/platform), so SYS.PRIVATE_LEAK is pinned here STRUCTURALLY (executed_in_ci:false): every expected code is registered in rules/codes.md and RD-21-consistent. The LIVE per-class block/pass behavior is exercised by the dedicated suite engine/gate/__tests__/privacy-leak.test.js (4 block classes + clean classes) and the module --selftest. All cases are HARD/block, route writer. No input fixture is read for structural cases (so no schema-bound *.entry.json is shipped here).

cases.name: secret-shape-leak
cases.trigger: Source-derived copy re-introduces a secret/credential shape (a token/bearer/signed-url/opaque-blob span) that redact.js patterns detect.
cases.notes: Universal: a credential pasted into ANY draft is a leak (no source context required).

cases.name: financial-structural-leak
cases.trigger: Copy carries a sensitive financial structural shape (currency-prefixed/magnitude-suffixed amount) the source pre-pass masks.
cases.notes: Reuses the source privacy-filter structural pattern family 'financial'.

cases.name: internal-id-structural-leak
cases.trigger: Copy carries an internal-id structural shape (UPPER-PREFIX-ALNUM ticket/record id).
cases.notes: Reuses the source privacy-filter structural pattern family 'internal_id'.

cases.name: configured-private-term-leak
cases.trigger: Copy contains a configured work_recap.private_term (partner name / codename / unreleased feature) verbatim.
cases.notes: Deny set unions config.work_recap.private_terms with the originating source seed's private_terms/privacy_flags. The explanation never echoes the matched term back (no re-leak).

cases.name: clean-source-copy
cases.trigger: Source-derived copy is clean even though the source's upstream privacy_flags.any_redacted is true (the pre-pass masked a different line). Only RESIDUAL leakage in the final copy blocks.
cases.notes: Negative case: clean final copy must PASS. The upstream flag is carried as evidence, not as a blocker.
